transactions.desc: The Orioles designated Siani for assignment on Monday.
The Orioles selected Tromp's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Monday.
Atlanta signed Leon to a minor-league deal on Monday, Lindsay Crosby of BravesToday.com reports.
Mancini elected free agency Monday.
The Angels designated Madrigal for assignment Monday.
The Angels reinstated Soler (oblique) from the 10-day injured list Monday. He'll start at designated hitter and bat cleanup in the Angels' series opener versus the Orioles.
The Rockies optioned Thompson to Triple-A Albuquerque on Monday.
The Rockies activated Moniak (ankle) from the 10-day injured list Monday.
The Astros recalled VanWey from Triple-A Sugar Land on Monday.
The Dodgers optioned McDermott to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Monday.
Slater elected free agency Monday after clearing waivers, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Dodgers activated Stewart (foot) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
Milwaukee reinstated Woodruff (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Monday in Cincinnati.
The Blue Jays selected Urias' contract from Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Blue Jays optioned Pinango to Triple-A Buffalo on Monday.
The Phillies activated Backhus (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Phillies recalled Rangel from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Monday.
The Reds optioned Maxwell to Triple-A Louisville on Monday.
The Reds selected Garcia's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Monday.
The Reds reinstated Johnson (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Monday.
The Reds designated Paddack for assignment Monday.
The Yankees recalled De Los Santos from Triple-A Scranton/Wilkes-Barre on Monday.
The Marlins recalled Brzykcy from Triple-A Jacksonville on Monday.
The White Sox optioned Quero to Triple-A Charlotte on Monday.
The White Sox activated Teel (knee/hamstring) from the 60-day injured list Monday.
The Phillies optioned Lazar to Triple-A Lehigh Valley following Sunday's 6-2 win over the Mets, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
The Phillies designated Wilson for assignment following Sunday's 6-2 win over the Mets, Matt Gelb of The Athletic reports.
Zazueta was promoted to Double-A Tulsa on Sunday, Kiley McDaniel of ESPN.com reports.
The Rays promoted Gillen from High-A Bowling Green to Double-A Montgomery on Sunday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
Atlanta outrighted Leon to Triple-A Gwinnett on Sunday.
